pi_items.source: Task instructions and expected_path variable explicit checks in verifier.py.
Task instructions 'Rated power (Pmp or STC) >= 380 W' and min_pmp_w threshold check in verifier.py.
Task instructions 'Module efficiency >= 20.0%' and min_efficiency_pct threshold check in verifier.py.
Task instructions 'Technology type contains 'Mono'' and req_tech lowercase filtering in verifier.py.
Task instructions 'Save the top 15 modules' and strict len(top_15) == 15 enforcement in verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the real-world California Energy Commission (CEC) Modules database bundled with NREL's System Advisor Model (SAM) desktop application. I verified the database from NREL's official SAM repository. The required criteria (Pmp >= 380 W, Efficiency >= 20.0%, and Monocrystalline technology) correctly filter thousands of authentic modules, and the agent is strictly required to output the top 15 by efficiency to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/premium_modules_report.json.
